name: Accountant
suggestedContacts: Business associates, legal professions, financial sector (bankers, other accountants).

name: Acrobat
suggestedContacts: Amateur athletic circles, sports writers, circuses, carnivals.

name: Actor
suggestedContacts: Theatre industry, newspaper arts critics, actor's guild or union.

name: Actor, Film Star
suggestedContacts: Film industry, media, agents, fans, fame-seekers.

name: Actor, Stage and Radio
suggestedContacts: Theatre industry, newspaper arts critics, actor's guild or union.

name: Agency Detective
suggestedContacts: Local law enforcement, clients.

name: Alienist
suggestedContacts: Others in the field of mental illness, medical doctors, and occasionally detectives in law enforcement.

name: Animal Trainer
suggestedContacts: Zoos, circus folk, patrons, actors.

name: Antiquarian
suggestedContacts: Booksellers, antique collectors, historical societies.

name: Antique Dealer
suggestedContacts: Local historians, other antique dealers, possibly criminal fences.

name: Archaeologist
suggestedContacts: Patrons, museums, universities.

name: Architect
suggestedContacts: Local building and city engineering departments, construction firms.

name: Artist
suggestedContacts: Art galleries, critics, wealthy patrons, the advertising industry.

name: Assassin
suggestedContacts: Few, mostly underworld; people prefer not to know them too well. The best will have earned a formidable reputation on the street.

name: Asylum Attendant
suggestedContacts: Medical staff, patients, and relatives of patients. Access to medical records, as well as drugs and other medical supplies.

name: Athlete
suggestedContacts: Sports personalities, sports writers, other media stars.

name: Author
suggestedContacts: Publishers, critics, historians, etc.

name: Bank Robber
suggestedContacts: Other gang members (current and retired), criminal freelancers, organized crime.

name: Bartender
suggestedContacts: Regular customers, possibly organized crime.

name: Big Game Hunter
suggestedContacts: Foreign government officials, game wardens, past (usually wealthy) clients, black-market gangs and traders, zoo owners.

name: Book Dealer
suggestedContacts: Bibliographers, book dealers, libraries and universities, clients.

name: Bootlegger
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, street-level law enforcement, local traders.

name: Bounty Hunter
suggestedContacts: Bail bondsmen, local police, criminal informants.

name: Boxer
suggestedContacts: Sports promoters, journalists, organized crime, professional trainers.

name: Burglar
suggestedContacts: Fences, other burglars.

name: Butler
suggestedContacts: Waiting staff of other households, local businesses and household suppliers.

name: Carpenter
suggestedContacts: Local building firms, suppliers, carpenters' union.

name: Chauffeur
suggestedContacts: Wealthy employers, background staff of the wealthy, local businesses.

name: Clergy, Member of the
suggestedContacts: Church hierarchy, local congregations, community leaders.

name: Clerk
suggestedContacts: Other office workers, Masons or other fraternal groups, local and federal government.

name: Computer Programmer
suggestedContacts: IT industry, online communities, hackers, government.

name: Computer Technician
suggestedContacts: IT industry, online communities, hackers, government.

name: Conman
suggestedContacts: Other confidence artists, freelance criminals.

name: Counterfeiter
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, businesspeople.

name: Cowboy
suggestedContacts: Local businesspeople, state agricultural departments, rodeo promoters, and entertainers.

name: Cowgirl
suggestedContacts: Local businesspeople, state agricultural departments, rodeo promoters, and entertainers.

name: Craftsperson
suggestedContacts: Local business people, other craftspeople and artists.

name: Criminal
suggestedContacts: Other petty criminals, street-level law enforcement.

name: Cult Leader
suggestedContacts: While the majority of followers will be regular people, the more charismatic the leader, the greater the possibility of celebrity followers, such as movie stars and rich widows.

name: Deprogrammer
suggestedContacts: Cult members and their families, law enforcement, psychologists.

name: Designer
suggestedContacts: Advertising, media, furnishings, architectural, other.

name: Dilettante
suggestedContacts: Variable, but usually people of a similar background and tastes, fraternal organizations, bohemian circles, high society at large.

name: Diver
suggestedContacts: Coast guard, ship captains, military, law enforcement, smugglers.

name: Doctor of Medicine
suggestedContacts: Other physicians, medical workers, patients and ex-patients.

name: Drifter
suggestedContacts: Other hobos, a few friendly railroad guards, soft touches in numerous towns.

name: Driver
suggestedContacts: Customers, businesses, law enforcement and general street level life.

name: Editor
suggestedContacts: News industry, local government, specialists (e.g. fashion designers, sports, business), publishers.

name: Elected Official
suggestedContacts: Political operatives, government, news media, business, foreign governments, possibly organized crime.

name: Engineer
suggestedContacts: Business or military workers, local government, architects.

name: Entertainer
suggestedContacts: Vaudeville, theater, film industry, entertainment critics, organized crime, and television (for modern-day).

name: Executive
suggestedContacts: Other office workers, Masons or other fraternal groups, local and federal government.

name: Explorer
suggestedContacts: Major libraries, universities, museums, wealthy patrons, other explorers, publishers, foreign government officials, local tribes people.

name: Farmer
suggestedContacts: Local bank, local politicians, state agricultural department.

name: Federal Agent
suggestedContacts: Federal agencies, law enforcement, organized crime.

name: Fence
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, trade contacts, black market and legitimate buyers.

name: Firefighter
suggestedContacts: Civic workers, medical workers, law enforcement.

name: Foreign Correspondent
suggestedContacts: National or worldwide news industry, foreign governments, military.

name: Forensic Surgeon
suggestedContacts: Laboratories, law enforcement, medical profession.

name: Forger
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, businesspeople.

name: Gambler
suggestedContacts: Bookies, organized crime, street scene.

name: Gangster
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, police, city government, politicians, judges, lawyers, businesses, and residents of the same ethnic community.

name: Gentleman
suggestedContacts: Upper classes and landed gentry, politics, servants and agricultural workers.

name: Gun Moll
suggestedContacts: Gangsters, law enforcement, local businesses.

name: Hacker
suggestedContacts: IT industry, online communities, hackers, government.

name: Hobo
suggestedContacts: Other hobos, a few friendly railroad guards, soft touches in numerous towns.

name: Hospital Orderly
suggestedContacts: Hospital and medical workers, patients. Access to drugs, medical records, etc.

name: Intern
suggestedContacts: Academics and other students, while interns may also know business people.

name: Investigative Journalist
suggestedContacts: News industry, politicians, street-level crime or law enforcement.

name: Journalist
suggestedContacts: News industry, politicians, street-level crime or law enforcement.

name: Judge
suggestedContacts: Legal connections, possibly organized crime.

name: Laboratory Assistant
suggestedContacts: Universities, scientists, librarians.

name: Laborer
suggestedContacts: Other workers and supervisors within their industry.

name: Lady
suggestedContacts: Upper classes and landed gentry, politics, servants and agricultural workers.

name: Lawyer
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, financiers, district attorneys and judges.

name: Librarian
suggestedContacts: Booksellers, community groups, specialist researchers.

name: Maid
suggestedContacts: Waiting staff of other households, local businesses and household suppliers.

name: Marine
suggestedContacts: Military, veterans associations.

name: Mechanic (and Skilled Trades)
suggestedContacts: Union members, trade-relevant specialists.

name: Military Officer
suggestedContacts: Military, federal government.

name: Millwright
suggestedContacts: Trade unions, factory workers, engineers.

name: Miner
suggestedContacts: Mining community, union members.

name: Missionary
suggestedContacts: Church hierarchy, foreign officials.

name: Mountain Climber
suggestedContacts: Other climbers, environmentalists, patrons, sponsors, local rescue or law enforcement, park rangers, sports clubs.

name: Museum Curator
suggestedContacts: Local universities and scholars, publishers, museum patrons.

name: Musician
suggestedContacts: Club owners, musicians' union, organized crime, street-level criminals.

name: Nurse
suggestedContacts: Hospital workers, physicians, community workers.

name: Occultist
suggestedContacts: Libraries, occult societies or fraternities, other occultists.

name: Outdoorsman
suggestedContacts: Local people and native folk, traders.

name: Outdoorswoman
suggestedContacts: Local people and native folk, traders.

name: Parapsychologist
suggestedContacts: Universities, parapsychological publications.

name: Pharmacist
suggestedContacts: Local community, local physicians, hospitals and patients. Access to all manner of chemicals and drugs.

name: Photographer
suggestedContacts: Advertising industry, local clients (including political organizations and newspapers).

name: Photojournalist
suggestedContacts: News industry, photographers, law enforcement.

name: Pilot
suggestedContacts: Old military contacts, cabin crew, mechanics, airfield staff, carnival entertainers.

name: Police Detective
suggestedContacts: Law enforcement, street level crime, coroner's office, judiciary, organized crime.

name: Police Officer
suggestedContacts: Law enforcement, street level crime, coroner's office, judiciary, organized crime.

name: Private Investigator
suggestedContacts: Law enforcement, clients.

name: Professor
suggestedContacts: Scholars, universities, libraries.

name: Prospector
suggestedContacts: Local businesses and residents.

name: Prostitute
suggestedContacts: Street scene, police, possibly organized crime, personal clientele.

name: Psychiatrist
suggestedContacts: Others in the field of mental illness, physicians and possibly legal professions.

name: Psychoanalyst
suggestedContacts: Psychological community, patients.

name: Psychologist
suggestedContacts: Psychological community, patients.

name: Reporter
suggestedContacts: News industry, politicians, street-level crime or law enforcement.

name: Researcher
suggestedContacts: Scholars, and academics, large businesses and corporations, foreign governments and individuals.

name: Sailor
suggestedContacts: Coast Guard, smugglers, organized crime.

name: Salesperson
suggestedContacts: Businesses within the same sector, favored customers.

name: Scientist
suggestedContacts: Other scientists and academics, universities, their employers and former employers.

name: Secretary
suggestedContacts: Other office workers, senior executives in client firms.

name: Shopkeeper
suggestedContacts: Local residents and businesses, local police, local government, customers.

name: Smuggler
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, Coast Guard, U.S. Customs officials.

name: Soldier
suggestedContacts: Military, veterans associations.

name: Spy
suggestedContacts: Generally only the person the spy reports to, possibly other connections developed while under cover.

name: Stonemason
suggestedContacts: Local building firms, geological societies, trade unions.

name: Street Punk
suggestedContacts: Petty criminals, the local fence, maybe the local gangster, certainly the local police.

name: Student
suggestedContacts: Academics and other students, while interns may also know business people.

name: Stuntman
suggestedContacts: The film and television industries, various explosive and pyrotechnic firms, actors and directors.

name: Thug
suggestedContacts: Organized crime, street-level law enforcement, local traders.

name: Tribe Member
suggestedContacts: Fellow tribe members.

name: Undertaker
suggestedContacts: Few.

name: Union Activist
suggestedContacts: Other labor leaders and activists, political friends, possibly organized crime. In the 1920s, also socialists, communists, and subversive anarchists.

name: Valet
suggestedContacts: Waiting staff of other households, local businesses and household suppliers.

name: Waiter
suggestedContacts: Customers, organized crime.

name: Waitress
suggestedContacts: Customers, organized crime.

name: Wrestler
suggestedContacts: Sports promoters, journalists, organized crime, professional trainers.

name: Zealot
suggestedContacts: Religious or fraternal groups, news media.

name: Zookeeper
suggestedContacts: Scientists, environmentalists.

name: Adventuress
suggestedContacts: Upper class society, wealthy patrons, law enforcement.

name: Alienist
suggestedContacts: Medical colleagues, patients and their families, academics.

name: Antiquarian
suggestedContacts: Museums, auction houses, antique dealers, academic historians.

name: Aristocrat
suggestedContacts: Nobility, government, military officers, land agents.

name: Artist
suggestedContacts: Art world, galleries, patrons, models, critics.

name: Blacksmith
suggestedContacts: Farmers, stablehands, local tradespeople.

name: Cabbie
suggestedContacts: Street people, petty criminals, passengers of all classes.

name: Clergy
suggestedContacts: Parishioners, local community leaders, Church hierarchy.

name: Consulting Detective
suggestedContacts: Police, government officials, street informants, clients.

name: Craftsperson
suggestedContacts: Guild members, local merchants, suppliers, customers.

name: Criminal (Gonoph)
suggestedContacts: Fellow criminals, fences, street people.

name: Criminal (Cracksman)
suggestedContacts: Fellow thieves, fences, receivers of stolen goods.

name: Criminal (Footpad)
suggestedContacts: Street criminals, local gang leaders.

name: Criminal (Magsman)
suggestedContacts: Con men, criminal gangs, wealthy marks.

name: Criminal (Macer)
suggestedContacts: Fences, criminal middlemen, society marks.

name: Criminal (Rampsman)
suggestedContacts: Street gang members, receivers of stolen goods.

name: Criminal (Screever)
suggestedContacts: Street beggars, forgers, petty criminals.

name: Criminal (Shofulman)
suggestedContacts: Currency dealers, fences, criminal underworld.

name: Criminal (Street Gang)
suggestedContacts: Gang members, street criminals, local fence.

name: Military Officer
suggestedContacts: Military colleagues, government, colonial administrators.

name: Military Enlisted/NCO
suggestedContacts: Military comrades, veterans' groups, local community.

name: Explorer
suggestedContacts: Royal Geographical Society, colonial government, native guides, academic institutions.

name: Gentleman/Gentlewoman
suggestedContacts: Upper classes, social clubs, local politics, servants.

name: Inquiry Agent
suggestedContacts: Police, solicitors, insurance companies, private clients.

name: Journalist
suggestedContacts: Press contacts, politicians, police, sources across society.

name: Inventor
suggestedContacts: Pulp Cthulhu only. Academic and industry contacts, patent office.

name: Laborer
suggestedContacts: Fellow laborers, local trade organizers, foremen.

name: Chimney Sweep
suggestedContacts: Household servants, building owners, other sweeps.

name: Gravedigger/Sexton
suggestedContacts: Clergy, undertakers, medical professionals, local community.

name: Navvy
suggestedContacts: Fellow navvies, railway companies, engineers.

name: Physician
suggestedContacts: Medical colleagues, specialists, patients, pharmacists.

name: Police Constable
suggestedContacts: Police force, local community, magistrates.

name: Police Detective
suggestedContacts: Scotland Yard, local police, magistrates, informants.

name: Scientist
suggestedContacts: Academic institutions, Royal Society, fellow researchers, industry.

name: Servant
